control.imgSavetoFolder: Image resource is saved to the folder where the media is located
control.ScanText1: Scan newly added and modified content
control.overideTipTitle: Do you want to scan and replace all?
control.overideTips: This scan mode will re-import all media library content and clear the original play history, favorites, collections, manual recognition data, and edited metadata. Please confirm if you wish to continue.
control.removeMediaLibTip: Do you want to remove this library? After removal, your media files will not be affected.
control.addTipText: This folder or its parent/child folder has been associated with the library. Please select another folder
control.CreateMediaLibraryTip: No more than {0} libraries can be created
control.MediaLibfileTip: Please select the folder associated with the library
control.MediaLibfileTip1: 1. It is recommended to add folders under NAS local storage for the best experience.
control.MediaLibfileTip2: 2. Adding network folders supported, but detailed file information (duration, coded format, etc.) under the network folders is unavailable.
control.MediaLibfileTip3: 3. Playback of files with WebDAV 302 redirect not allowed, please select local proxy policy.
control.tmdbKeyTip: Your TMDB keys will be cleared and you cannot get video information from TMDB
control.scrapeTip: Scraping task is running. It cannot be cleared. Please wait for completion
control.navMenuTip: Set the display and order of the navigation menu, effective only for the current user on PC.
control.carouselTip: Set the display and source of the carousel, with a maximum of 5 items displayed at a time. Items without background images will not be shown. Effective only for the current user on PC.
control.homeSettingModuleTip: Customize the display and order of homepage modules. Modules will only be shown on the homepage if they have content.
control.contentCardSettingTip: Set the display of media content cards, effective only for the current user on PC.
control.identifyPiecesOfTvTips: Only supports identifying local episodes on the NAS. Time consumption depends on the number, size and duration of episodes and currently playing episodes will be prioritized for identification. It is recommended to enable this feature in advance
control.cloudDiskDirectLinkTip: For cloud drive resources, direct playback is prioritized
control.directLinkWarningTip: The permission of direct playback for cloud drives should be limited to frequent users. Excessive access from multiple IP addresses may trigger risk control mechanisms
control.MediaLibfileTip4: 4. Supports mounting to cloud drives via "Files". Playback performance and stability may be affected by cloud drive interfaces and network conditions
control.somePathsInvalid: The path shown in red is invalid. Please delete it
control.confirmClearPreBuffer: Do you want to clear the pre-buffer data?
control.confirmClearPreBufferTip1: 1. Once enabled, the video player will preload upcoming content during playback to ensure smoother and more continuous playback. Please note that this may result in additional data usage when connected to a mobile network
control.confirmClearPreBufferTip2: 2. Pre-buffer data takes up space on your device. When the storage limit is reached, the oldest cache will be automatically overwritten on a rolling basis - no manual cleanup is required
control.clearPreBufferFail: Failed to clear. Please try again later
control.cacheEffectTip: Saved successfully. It will take effect on the next playback
control.updateClientVersionTip: To use this feature, please update your client to the latest version

guide.firstTip1: Cilck Library to add and edit library
guide.secondTip: Enable TMDB and Intelligent Recognition to automatically get the latest videos information
guide.secondTip2: Enable TMDB to automatically get the latest videos information
guide.threeTip: Manage user library permissions
guide.homeBubbleTip: Go to Avatar > Settings to manage libraries, TMDB data sources and user permissions.
guide.homeTip: Please create library. When creation is complete, you can update media data by uploading files or adding folder path to library

home.guideTipOne: Welcome to Theater. There are two steps for basic configuration.
home.guideTipTwo: The system has two, pre-created libraries. Click the icon to associate the NAS file with the library. This can be changed in the settings.
home.guideTipThree: The first step is already done. The system is scanning the library, and TMDB scraping can be configured.
home: To get more details of your videos
home.hostTips: If there are multiple configurations, please line break. No more than 100 lines at a time
home.MediaLibEmptyTip: No videos, please check library settings
home.name: Name
home.title: Title
home.uploadFormatTip: Supports jpg, jpeg, png, webp, bmp, under 5 MB
home.linkShareSuccess: Created and copied the share link
home.linkShareFail: Failed to create the share link
home.uploadImgTip: Please upload image up to 5MB in size
home.saveFail: Failed to save. Please try again
home.deleteSourceFileTip: Do you want to delete the source file?
home.deleteSourceFileTip2: Do you want to delete the selected video source file?
home.deleteCollectionTip: This operation will disband the selected collection. It does not affect your video source files.
home.networkErr: Network or device status error. Please check and try again.
home.fileNotExist: Save failed, image file does not exist
home.skipTipText: Do you want to skip it? If you do not create the library, the theater cannot be used. After skipping, you can also  create the library in settings.
home.refreshDataTip: Content expired. Please refresh the page.
home.compressImageTip: For service performance, photos over 1 MB will be compressed to 1 MB or less after upload.
home.deleteContinuePlayRecordTip: It will delete the selected playback records.
home.homePageModuleAllDisabledTip: All homepage modules are disabled. Go to “Settings” to customize your homepage.
home.fileModeNotSupportTip: The current file format does not support retrieving video information
home.cardRateTips: Ratings are based on configured data sources
home.resolutionTips: Only local NAS movies support resolution display
home.saveEditDataTip: Do you want to save this edit?
home.removeCollectionTips: After removal, the collection will be empty and automatically disbanded
home.imgNotSupportTip: Supports jpg, jpeg, png, webp, bmp formats, with size up to 5 MB
home.unbindTips: When unmatched, movies and TVs will be recognized as “Unknown” contents, which can be found in “Others” category
home.scanOptimizeTips: The system is optimizing recognition results of added contents in library, please wait patiently
home.playFailTip: Failed to play. You can add up to 200 items at a time
